mentions.note: Jetro acquisition ($21.6B cash + 91.5M shares) combines only two real games in food distribution; natural feeder play; management quality high, upside ahead.

Jetro acquisition adds 20% revenue, 55% FCF growth; transforms industry with full-spectrum restaurant supply model (cash-and-carry + delivery); CEO Hourican articulate on synergies and no price hikes; steal after selloff.
